nodes.title: 什么时候需要face detailer？
widgets_values:
针对很多人在直接使用角色 LoRA 时容易出现效果不佳的问题，这里分享一下我个人在创作中的解决思路。
我会先在不加载任何角色 LoRA 的情况下生成基础图像，而是通过正向提示词对角色进行尽可能详细的描述。
在生成完成的最后阶段，我再加入一个面部细化（Face Detailer）流程，用来将你想使用的角色 LoRA 进行“换脸”。

需要注意的是，细化流程中的提示词一定要根据整体画面进行调整，否则很容易得到 LoRA 自带的默认脸型效果。

你可以运行下面的 Preview Image 节点，在进行 SD 放大之前先预览图像。随机新种子来抽卡。

修改 Prompt / Lora，进行预览，如果没有明显缺陷，再运行完整工作流。

在第一轮生成中，你应该重点关注：
- 构图
- 主要缺陷 / 姿势异常（小缺陷通常可以在第二轮生成中修复）


在第二轮生成中，你应该重点关注细节：
- 手指 / 脚趾
- 面部表情
- 文字
- 其他任何细小的细节

↓

nodes.title: Lora Usage / LoRa使用建议
widgets_values:
All Moody Models (ZIB/ZIT) recommends using ZIB Loras！
全线MOODY系列模型均推荐使用ZIB模型！

LoRas used on ZIB will have stronger effect on image structure whereas LoRas used on ZIT will be more toward the details.
在ZIB步骤使用的LoRa会影响构图和动作，在ZIT步骤的LoRa会影响更多细节。

当然，如果你想要超级相似的人物，你可以把ZIB的人物Lora同时放在第一和第二步里，
to achieve absolute likeliness, you can put your ZIB character lora in both ZIB and ZIT steps

nodes.title: Face Detailer README
widgets_values:
To address the issue many of you are facing—where using character LoRAs directly leads to poor results—here’s the approach I personally use in my workflow.
I generate the base image without loading any character LoRAs, and instead describe the character in detail within the positive prompts.
After the image is generated, I apply a face detailer workflow at the final stage to effectively “face-swap” using the character LoRA you want.
Make sure to adjust the prompts inside the detailer flow so they match the overall image; otherwise, you may end up with a generic default face from the LoRA.

SeedVr is not required. Enabled only when needed. The first load is expected to be very long since it will be downloading models. Choose 7b or 3b variant if you have oom issues.


SeedVr 不是必须的，仅在有需要时启用。首次加载时间会较长，因为需要下载模型文件。如果遇到内存不足（OOM）问题，请选择 7B 或 3B 版本。 国内小伙伴可以自行在网上下载。

nodes.title: SD Upscale / SD 放大
widgets_values:
SD放大提示词默认为跟主提示词一样，但是如果放大后发现有奇怪的物体，比如说皮肤莫名有水渍，图片有莫名水印，奇怪的纹路，那将提示词换成一个比较通用的再做SD放大效果会更好。只需断开主提示词的链接就好。

By default, the SD upscaling prompt is the same as the main prompt. However, if you notice strange artifacts after upscaling—such as random water stains on skin, unexpected watermarks, or odd textures—it's better to switch the prompt to a more general one before running SD upscaling again for improved results. (To do that, disconnect the connection from the main prompt)

nodes.title: Skin Contrast 皮肤对比
widgets_values:
This sections adds details to skin to get a more realistic feeling. Good for super realistic character images generation.

欧美或者写实风可考虑打开。平时不推荐。

nodes.title: SD Upscale Prompt 放大提示词 -
widgets_values: 韩风冷色调网红美白滤镜，极致冷白皮，overexposure，皮肤细腻毛孔与真实绒毛清晰可见。8K, masterpiece, high quality.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: 19 years old cute Chines girl, 鞠婧祎, cute smile

It is slightly better to keep the same seed for 1st and 2nd gen for consistent result, but change this if 1st gen is ok and 2nd gen needs some minor fixes.

为了获得一致的结果，最好第一代和第二代使用相同的种子，但如果第一次生图满意没问题而第二次需要一些小的改进，则可以更改这个值。平时重置为0最佳。

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Prompt)
widgets_values: A stunning portrait of a single young woman, upper body composition, gazing directly at the viewer with striking pink eyes and a composed closed-mouth expression. She has long, flowing multicolored hair that emits a soft neon glow, styled with blunt bangs framing her face. Her hair is adorned with delicate ornaments — a fabric hair flower, dangling tassels, silk ribbons, and layered frills that catch the light. Her fingernails shimmer with glitter, refracting holographic light. She wears holographic, iridescent clothing that shifts color like an oil slick. The atmosphere is ethereal, dreamlike, with a soft pastel gradient background — lavender into mint into peach — radiating a gentle ambient glow around her figure. Rendered in expressive, high-resolution pixel art with ultra-fine detail, pristine quality, and a deeply aesthetic, luminous finish.

nodes.title: For special requests | 1 on 1 help contact me at

widgets_values:
You can run Preview Image node below to preview see the image before SD upscale. Change up the seed until you find the best generation.

Change Prompt/Lora/Seed, preview, no defects? run full workflow. 

In 1st Generation you should be looking at the
 - composition
 - major defects/pose anormalies (small defects will likely be fixed in 2nd generation)

In 2nd Generation, you should be looking at the fine details
 - fingers/toes
 - facial expression
 - text
 - any other small details

↓

nodes.title: Suitable for Zimage Distilled and Zimage Turbo models
适用于Zimage蒸馏和Zimage Turbo模型
Empty Latent Image (Base Dimensions) 初始大小

widgets_values:
The final resolution will be：
base * 1.7(for 2nd gen) * 2.2 (for sd upscale）


最终图片大小为:
初始大小 x 1.7 (第二次生成前放大）x
2.2 (SD 放大倍数）
